infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow camera for KYC live face scan and document capture
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow microphone so you can say a verification word during live face scan
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow photo library access to scan bank account details
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Allow access to contacts to fill in phone numbers for airtime and data purchases
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Datamart may use your location to help detect unusual sign-in activity and protect your account. Location is not used for airtime or data purchases.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow access to photos to scan account details
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow camera to scan account details

plugins.contactsPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your contacts to fill in phone numbers.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your camera for live face scan during KYC verification.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to record audio while you say a verification word during live face scan.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your camera for live face scan during KYC verification.
plugins.microphonePermissionText: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to record audio while you say a verification word during live face scan.
